title: Throwable Explosives
description: Allows you to throw primed TNT blocks from your hand when holding flint and steel in your off-hand.
body:
**Description**
---
Are you tired of the monotonous process of detonating explosives? Throwable Explosives allows you to throw primed TNT blocks directly from your hand!


**Usage Guide**
---
1. Have some TNT in your main hand
2. Have some flint and steel in your off-hand
3. Right-click in an open space


**Related Mods**
---
For an even better experience, consider pairing this mod with the mods below that have also been developed by me.

- [Realistic Explosion Physics](https://modrinth.com/mod/realistic-explosion-physics)
- [Submerged Explosions](https://modrinth.com/mod/submerged-explosions)
